author: DominicVainMod
content:
@All Pings @Game Pings 

New SAGE Labs Update

Today's SAGE Labs update is being pushed now and all of your accounts should be updated over the next 1-2 hours. 

This update includes:
• SDU requirement adjustments
• LP overhaul
• SDU sector cooldowns adjustment
• The all-new Meta Crafting Station! 
You can find the full change list here: ⁠🩹┃patch-notes⁠

With these updates now going live, we want to also let you all know that we will temporarily be pausing regular updates to SAGE Labs. Our focus will be on bringing Fleet Command up to feature parity. To give context, each update to SAGE Labs requires corresponding development into Fleet Command, which can extend the timeline for our next major UE5 release. By concentrating on bringing Fleet Command up to speed, it's going to allow for a better and more polished experience for everyone.

And if you don't know what Fleet Command is, it's SAGE Labs but integrated into the UE5 Star Atlas experience. Here's a reminder of what's coming!
